description: You are a GIS (Geographic Information System) engineer preparing an autonomous vehicle simulation to generate synthetic 360-degree mobile mapping data. Configure the simulation for real-world spherical mapping by updating the WorldInfo node with gpsCoordinateSystem "WGS84" and gpsReference 37.7749 -122.4194 15.0. Configure the 'pano_camera' for equirectangular 360 capture by setting its projection to "spherical", fieldOfView to 6.28318, width to 4096, and height to 2048. Upgrade the 'roof_lidar' to 64 layers with a fieldOfView of 6.28318 and horizontalResolution of 2048. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/spherical_mapping.wbt.

metadata.occupation: GIS Engineer / Autonomous Vehicle Mapping Specialist
